title: ZXSpace

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZX Snake, ZX Brick and ZX Space

description: ZXSpace is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), a retro-inspired city-defence formation shooter featuring alien waves, shield and city damage, power-up drops, unlockable cannon skins, achievements, leaderboards, and classic arcade visuals.
features: Defend the city from invading alien waves
Multiple alien rows with different score values
City damage and restoration through rewarded continue
Double Laser and Shield Repair power-up drops
BarkinMad Coins for cross-game cosmetic unlocks

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic items across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned through gameplay only.

seoTitle: ZXSpace | Retro Space Shooter | BarkinMad Studios
summary: ZXSpace is a retro city-defence space shooter with alien waves, shields, auto-fire, power-ups, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
